3186420.name: Cannon Island
3186420.description:
In this relaxing and fun game, you build your own little city on a cute island. But you have rivals and when you collide with them, the guns will decide who stays on the island.

Your goal is to build a city on islands that become bigger and bigger with each new level. Manage resources, make sure that there is no shortage. To do this, you need to wisely place buildings on the right hexes, so that you get more resources from the area. The combination of buildings also matters. So building in this game is a puzzle. But everything is very simple, the game is made for fun and relaxation.
